observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the integrated whole of the psyche, the center of consciousness and identity
observations.summary: Dan is identified as the Self archetype, symbolizing the boundary between earth and heaven, indicating his role as a central figure undergoing integration and spiritual emergence.

evidence.quote: Dan. The city at the base of Mount Hermon, where the ancients said the boundary between earth and heaven grew thin.
